name: the-happiness-hypothesis
description: Jonathan Haidt's The Happiness Hypothesis — psychology toolkit bridging ancient wisdom and modern science to understand happiness, meaning, morality, and human flourishing
useCase: Understand the divided self, overcome negativity bias, use reciprocity effectively, recognize personal bias, pursue lasting happiness, and find meaning
knownRisks: The happiness formula (H = S + C + V) is a simplification — real happiness is more complex
Some ancient wisdom cited may conflict with readers' cultural or religious views
The Rider-Elephant metaphor, while useful, is an analogy, not a precise neurological model
